entities.name: BALANCED NUTRITION
entities.description: The application of nutrients to correct soil deficiencies and optimize crop growth.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural product produced per unit area.

entities.description: The financial aspects and cost-benefit analysis of crop production.

entities.description: General category of crops including gourds, chillies, and tubers.

entities.name: SOIL TEST ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of analyzing soil to determine nutrient levels and deficiencies.

entities.name: SULPHUR DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A state where sulphur levels in the soil are insufficient for optimal crop growth.

entities.name: ZINC DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A state where zinc levels in the soil are insufficient for optimal crop growth.

entities.name: BORON DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A state where boron levels in the soil are insufficient for optimal crop growth.

entities.name: NITROGEN DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A state where nitrogen levels in the soil are low.

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A state where available phosphorus levels in the soil are low to medium.

entities.name: FOLIAR SPRAY
entities.description: The application of nutrients directly to the leaves of the plant.

entities.name: BENEFIT COST RATIO
entities.description: A ratio used to evaluate the economic efficiency of an investment in balanced nutrition.
